description: TUNGSTEN 9.43, second Fable 5 sweep (built on 9.42). 3 fixes: (A) IC prior preservation -- 70/30 blend no longer decays skipped regimes toward the 0.05 fallback, priors retained in full when a regime has thin data; (B) Spearman midranks -- tie-correct fractional ranking via sort+binary search, replaces O(n^2) competition ranking (~4.6B comparisons/calibration -> O(n log n)); (C) Kelly advisory units -- taylorDecision fraction now converted to genuine lots via equity/SL-distance/tick-value. COMPILE-VERIFY ONLY: compile in MetaEditor, report errors/warnings via relay. If compile fails, fix minimally and report exactly what changed.
